Related: #15099

Demo C adds the v13.2 dense-workstation proof: twenty dock items at 2560x1440, a renderer-rich 100,000-row `Store<Model>` grid, a capped batched 10-records/sec feed, two source-owned rails, real tab overflow, split-and-return choreography, and both AgentOS themes. The signature holds under live transformation: the content never stops living while the workspace moves.

Evidence: L3 (local 2560x1440 Chromium + Neural Link + Canvas Worker journey) → L3 required (AC1-5 and AC8-10). Residual: AC6 [`#15099`] — attach the final 30-second recording before ready-for-review.

## Deltas from ticket

The ticket's cached-pane composition remains the authority, but live falsification sharpened its mechanism. Demo C now stages the next dock shell under the real closest common parent, silently transfers pane ownership with `keepMounted`, and performs one `updateDepth = -1` reconciliation so Neo emits DOM moves instead of remove/reinsert cycles. The trace exposed an override-signature gap in `Neo.tab.BodyContainer` / `Neo.tab.Container`; this PR forwards the existing four-argument atomic-remove contract and adds direct, delegated, and negative-control unit coverage.

The same journey also hardened two consumed seams without inventing Demo-C-local substitutes: overflow recapture restores hidden headers before natural-width measurement, and edge rails opt out of flex growth. Demo C still owns only its model, stores, producer, screenplay, view composition, and token-based SCSS.

## Test Evidence

- Dense workstation runtime: `NEO_E2E_PORT=18130 npx playwright test agentos/DemoCDenseWorkstationNL -c test/playwright/playwright.config.e2e.mjs --workers=1 --reporter=line` — 1/1 passed twice on the final patch, including exact pane/body/Canvas DOM identity, zero blank or missing grid frames, live OffscreenCanvas registration and pixel mutation, exact 100,000-row store, capped 10/sec feed growth, two rails, overflow partition/activation, FLIP motion, both themes, and zero runtime/page errors.
- Composition + consumed seams: focused unit matrix for Demo C, TourRunner content, DockLayoutAdapter, Overflow, and BodyContainer — 44/44 passed; post-fast-forward critical subset — 7/7 passed.
- Repository gates: `npx lint-staged` — 19 files passed whitespace, shorthand, JSDoc types, ticket archaeology, block alignment, parse, and AiConfig test-mutation checks.
- AgentOS theme ownership: `npm run check-agentos-theme` — parity, token-only, and completeness passed.
- Source preflight: `npm run agent-preflight -- --no-fix <17 changed .mjs files>` — all requested gates passed.
- Visual surface: final 2560x1440 screenshot inspected locally; 30-second two-theme recording is staged for attachment to this draft before ready-for-review.

## Post-Merge Validation

- [x] None. All runtime and visual acceptance gates are pre-merge; this draft remains blocked only on attaching AC6.

## Evolution

The first implementation treated cached pane re-projection as destroy-free ownership bookkeeping. The live Canvas falsifier showed that a tab override dropped `keepMounted`, causing an otherwise invisible mounted true→false transition and invalidating transferred OffscreenCanvas ownership. Tobi's common-parent update model supplied the correct invariant: silent source/target mutation plus one closest-common-parent reconciliation. The final E2E proves the exact DOM identities survive; viewport pool cardinality is deliberately not frozen because it is geometry-derived.
